title: 3 Surprising Facts About Dogs

segments.text: Dogs can understand over 165 words on average.
But they can do much more than just obey.
Some dogs can even read human emotions.
And they sleep more than 12 hours a day!
Is your dog a genius or just sleepy?
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Discover how smart dogs really are! Follow for daily facts! 🐕
